title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Reliance Digital Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Reliance Digital Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Digital Global Group! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Digital Global Group:
Reliance Digital Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Global Group!
